name: Cannop Ponds Circular
highlights: Two jewel-like millponds ringed by oak and the old Cannop tramroad.
points_of_interest: Cannop Ponds (former colliery reservoirs); mandarin ducks; Cannop Sawmill
viewpoints: Reflections of oak canopy in still water
food_drink_nearby: The Fountain Inn Parkend; The Woodman Parkend
hazards_notes: Ponds can flood paths in winter; mandarins sensitive
